# Videos Folder

Place your cooking video files in this folder. The application supports MP4 video format.

## Supported Videos

The following video files should be placed here:

- `overnight-oats.mp4` - Quick Overnight Oats recipe
- `egg-omelette.mp4` - Fluffy Egg White Omelette
- `smoothie-bowl.mp4` - Smoothie Bowl Art
- `mediterranean-bowl.mp4` - Mediterranean Grain Bowl
- `thai-wraps.mp4` - Thai Chicken Lettuce Wraps
- `salmon.mp4` - One-Pan Lemon Herb Salmon
- `stir-fry.mp4` - Veggie Stir-Fry Masterclass
- `energy-bites.mp4` - Protein Energy Bites
- `kale-chips.mp4` - Baked Kale Chips
- `golden-milk.mp4` - Anti-Inflammatory Golden Milk
- `green-juice.mp4` - Green Power Juice

## Video Format Requirements

- Format: MP4 (H.264 codec recommended)
- Resolution: 1280x720 (720p) or higher
- Maximum file size: 50MB per video
- Duration: 1-30 minutes

## How to Add Videos

1. Convert your cooking videos to MP4 format
2. Name them according to the list above
3. Place them in this folder
4. The application will automatically use local videos when available

If local videos are not found, the application will fall back to displaying thumbnails only.
